clips.visual: Cinematic 16:9. Evening apartment hallway. Young Asian woman late 20s opens front door, walks in exhausted, carrying laptop bag. Warm indoor lighting. Slow tracking shot. Shallow depth of field.

audio.sfx: apartment door opening, soft footsteps, distant city noise

clips.visual: Interior night. Same woman in pajamas at laptop. Screen shows 9 windows: AI chat, video editor, audio waveform, subtitle editor, prompt box. She copies and pastes repeatedly, looking tired. Medium close-up from behind screen.

audio.voiceover: Prompt… image… voice… music… video… subtitles…
audio.sfx: keyboard typing, mouse clicking, notification pings
audio.music: slightly chaotic and busy, building tension

clips.visual: Same woman leans back rubbing temples. Camera pans to pink sofa beside her — seven cats in different colors lounging, some stretching, some yawning, one flicking tail lazily. Woman glances at them with envy.

audio.voiceover: I wish my cats could do the work for me…

clips.visual: Close-up of orange tabby cat walking toward woman, jumps onto desk, looks directly at her. Cat meows once. Woman's eyes widen — lightbulb moment. Dramatic close-up transitioning between woman and cat. Screen fades to black. Text: ContextCat / One mention. Six cats. Three minutes.
